briefdescription.para: IPI response buffer indices for algorithm info query.

detaileddescription.para: Response buffer index for algorithm version

briefdescription.para: Response buffer index for NIST compliance status.
This file contains the xsecure API IDs for versal_2ve_2vm.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
5.4 kal 07/24/24 Initial release sk 08/22/24 Added support for key transfer to ASU am 02/24/25 Moved XSECURE_API_ASU_KEY_TRANSFER to xilplmi pre 03/02/25 Added API IDs for SHA2 operation 5.7 tvp 04/30/26 Added API IDs for ELLIPTIC_PRIVATE_KEY_GEN
